title: Portfolio Items Schema
description: Schema for validating and editing Nazmi Yucel Can portfolio items

date.description: Date or period of the project (e.g. March 2026)

imageUrl.description: Path to the project card image in static directory (e.g., images/portfolio-images/image.png)

techStack.description: Comma-separated list of technologies used (e.g., Python, PyQt5, OpenCV)

detailFile.description: Path to the project markdown detail file (e.g., portfolio/slug.md)

links.description: Relevant project links (GitHub, Live Demo, Kaggle, etc.)

label.description: Label of the link (e.g. GitHub, Kaggle, Canlı Demo)
